# Master Hachimi (哈基米道长)

> Master Hachimi (哈基米道长 / Master Hachimi) is a cat-themed Mei Hua Yi Shu (Plum Blossom divination) companion app. You share two numbers and the question on your mind; a unified backend casts an I Ching hexagram by a fixed method, and a third-party AI service (its nature and our commitments are set out in the Privacy Policy) writes the reading in the warm voice of "Master Hachimi". It offers comfort and one small next step, for entertainment and emotional companionship only, never prediction, fate-changing, or luck. No account, reading history stays on your device, no ads. Brand Hachimi.ai. Available on the App Store (iOS) and Google Play (Android), distributed outside mainland China.

Official website: hachimi.ai. Last updated: 2026-07-09.

## Download

- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787621766): Download for iPhone

## How it works

- [Ask](https://hachimi.ai/en#features): Type the question on your mind and give two numbers off the top of your head. No sign-up, no account.
- [Cast](https://hachimi.ai/en#features): The two numbers and the current hour set a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram by a fixed, deterministic method. Same inputs, same cast, honest math.
- [Read](https://hachimi.ai/en#features): Master Hachimi answers in a warm cat voice, walking through what the hexagram shows, a gentle take, and a small blessing, saved to your local history.

## Principles

- [Why Master Hachimi](https://hachimi.ai/en#tech): Deterministic casting; for entertainment only (no prediction / fate-changing / luck claims); no account and privacy-first; a warm cat companion.

## Privacy

- No account, and no third-party analytics SDKs. On the backend, cast events (your question, scenario, hexagram, and reading) are stored under the single explicit consent you give on first launch, keyed to a resettable anonymous install ID, with free text auto-deleted after 90 days. There is no separate toggle: withdraw consent and nothing further is sent or stored.
- To write a reading, only your question + chosen scenario + hexagram + time-of-day are sent to a third-party AI service. The nature of that service, and our commitments regarding it — a reputable commercial paid-tier service that we have required not to train on your content — are set out in the Privacy Policy. The two cast numbers are never sent to that third-party service.
- Reading history lives only on your device; delete it in Settings or uninstall the app.
- All network calls use standard HTTPS/TLS; client device-integrity attestation (Firebase App Check / Apple App Attest) to deter abuse is planned (not yet enforced at launch).

- [App Store listing](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787621766): iOS app
- [Official Website (English)](https://hachimi.ai/en): Product landing page
- [Official Website (Chinese)](https://hachimi.ai/zh): 中文产品页

- [Methodology (Chinese)](https://hachimi.ai/zh/methodology): 中文方法论页
- [Support](https://hachimi.ai/en/support): Quick fixes, FAQ, and how to reach us

- [Account & Your Data (Chinese)](https://hachimi.ai/zh/account-deletion): 中文账号与数据页
- [Delete Data](https://hachimi.ai/en/data-deletion): How to delete your data
